{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/172214852?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TarPeg007/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TarPeg007/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TarPeg007/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TarPeg007/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/TarPeg007", "id": 172214852, "login": "TarPeg007", "node_id": "U_kgDOCkPKRA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TarPeg007/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TarPeg007/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TarPeg007/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TarPeg007/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TarPeg007/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/TarPeg007", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-401", "name": "Missing Release of Memory after Effective Lifetime"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "## Summary

A WebSocket upgrade request to an `upgradeWebSocket` route with a missing or malformed `Sec-WebSocket-Key` header leaks memory permanently. The request's `IncomingMessage` is retained in an internal map and a pending promise is never settled, even though no connection is established. Since the route is reachable pre-handshake without authentication, an unauthenticated attacker can flood it to gradually exhaust memory.

## Details

The built-in WebSocket helper cleans up its internal map only on a successful handshake or when the route guard rejects the request. When `ws` aborts the handshake because `Sec-WebSocket-Key` is missing or malformed, no `connection` event is emitted, so neither cleanup path runs and the entry is retained forever. A present-but-malformed key leaks identically, so a proxy that only checks for the header's presence does not mitigate it.

## Impact

An unauthenticated attacker can flood any public `upgradeWebSocket` route with malformed-key upgrade requests, causing unbounded memory growth and eventual loss of availability. No confidentiality or integrity impact.

Reported by @TarPeg007.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9mqv-5hh9-4cgg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-21T22:04:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9mqv-5hh9-4cgg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9mqv-5hh9-4cgg"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-21T22:04:27Z", "references": ["https://github.com/honojs/node-server/security/advisories/GHSA-9mqv-5hh9-4cgg", "https://github.com/honojs/node-server/commit/3a21938c418340e980cb7ffa88e78369f78392d1", "https://github.com/honojs/node-server/releases/tag/v2.0.10", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9mqv-5hh9-4cgg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/honojs/node-server/security-advisories/GHSA-9mqv-5hh9-4cgg", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/honojs/node-server", "summary": "Node.js Adapter for Hono: Unauthenticated memory-leak DoS via aborted WebSocket handshake", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-21T22:04:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9mqv-5hh9-4cgg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.0.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@hono/node-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0, <= 2.0.9"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Node.js Adapter for Hono: Unauthenticated memory-leak DoS via aborted WebSocket handshake
